name: Paymentology
description: Card-issuing and processing APIs supporting Visa, Mastercard, UnionPay with instant virtual and physical card issuance.

seo.title: Paymentology — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paymentology: Card-issuing and processing APIs supporting Visa, Mastercard, UnionPay with instant virtual and physical card issuance.

when_to_use: Issuing virtual Visa/Mastercard cards instantly via API
Launching prepaid card programs on UnionPay rails
Physical card issuance for global fintech card products

pros: Used by Revolut and Standard Bank
review.verdict: Top-tier card issuing for fintechs going global, but clearly priced and scoped for enterprise teams.
review.best_for: Fintechs scaling global card issuing with multi-network and multi-region coverage
review.not_for: Startups needing acquiring, or small teams without volume commitments

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
